h3_1_poisoning.note: System vulnerable to memory poisoning. No defense mechanism present.

h3_2_graph_corruption.note: No input validation on graph nodes. Arbitrary concepts accepted.

h3_3_sleep_disruption.note: Partial sleep cycles possible. No transaction rollback.

h3_4_retrieval_saturation.note: Linear scan retrieval. No index. O(N) per query.

h3_5_sequence_overload.note: Sequential scan in Mamba core. Acceptable O(L) but high constant factor.

h3_6_noisy_inputs.note: No noise-robust retrieval. Cosine similarity vulnerable to perturbation.

h3_7_domain_shift.note: No domain boundaries. Cross-domain interference unchecked.
